# Test basic client-server interaction using MCP tools

# Test mcpspy basic functionality with JSON input
exec bash -c 'echo "{\"jsonrpc\": \"2.0\", \"id\": 1, \"method\": \"initialize\", \"params\": {\"protocolVersion\": \"2025-03-26\"}}" | mcpspy --pretty'
stdout '"jsonrpc": "2.0"'
stdout '"method": "initialize"'
stdout '"protocolVersion": "2025-03-26"'

# Test mcpdiff with identical files
exec bash -c 'echo "test content" > file1.txt && cp file1.txt file2.txt'
exec mcpdiff file1.txt file2.txt
! stderr 'differ'

# Cleanup
exec rm -f file1.txt file2.txt
